notes: RentSync Levels view with floorplan-navigator shadow DOM web components (same pattern as The Diamond). Two buildings: Elm (#fpn-elm) and Ledbury (#fpn-led). pre_capture_js clicks Levels tab, iterates floor filters in each buildings shadow DOM, captures unit listing text, injects into body. Incentive: Up to Two Months Free.
pre_capture_js: (async function() { function delay(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms); }); } async function scrapeBuilding(fpnId, label) { var fpn = document.querySelector(fpnId); if (!fpn || !fpn.shadowRoot) return []; var sr = fpn.shadowRoot; var floors = sr.querySelectorAll("li.unit-filters__floor"); if (!floors.length) return []; var allText = []; for (var i = 0; i < floors.length; i++) { floors[i].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("click", {bubbles: true})); await delay(1500); var waited = 0; while (waited < 3000) { var listing = sr.querySelector(".unit-listing__ul"); if (listing && listing.textContent.trim().length > 10) break; await delay(300); waited += 300; } var listing = sr.querySelector(".unit-listing__ul"); if (listing) { var t = listing.textContent.trim().replace(/\\s+/g, " "); if (t.length > 5) { var floorLabel = floors[i].textContent.trim(); allText.push(label + " " + floorLabel + ": " + t); } } } return allText; } var elmData = await scrapeBuilding("#fpn-elm", "ELM"); var ledTab = document.querySelector("a.ledbury"); if (ledTab) { ledTab.click(); await delay(2000); var ledContainer = document.querySelector("#ledburyfpn"); if (ledContainer) { ledContainer.classList.remove("hidden"); ledContainer.style.display = "block"; var fpnLed = document.querySelector("#fpn-led"); if (fpnLed) { fpnLed.classList.remove("hidden"); fpnLed.style.display = "inline"; } } await delay(2000); } var ledData = await scrapeBuilding("#fpn-led", "LEDBURY"); var allData = elmData.concat(ledData); if (allData.length > 0) { var div = document.createElement("div"); div.id = "elmledbury-units"; div.textContent = allData.join("\n"); document.body.appendChild(div); } })()
extraction_hint: IMPORTANT: This property has two buildings — Elm (units labeled 'Unit NNN') and Ledbury (units labeled 'Suite NNN'). Extract ALL units from BOTH buildings.
